title: haplophyllum telephioides
intro: Haplophyllum telephioides, also known as the Terebinth, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Haplophyllum telephioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil can be used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
